---
title: "Time Series Analysis Report"
author: "ts-agents"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: letter
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
    colorlinks: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: true
---

## Objective

Describe the analysis goal and decision context.

## Dataset

- Source:
- Time range:
- Sampling frequency:
- Variables used:

## Methodology

1. Data preparation
2. Model or analysis approach
3. Validation protocol

## Results

### Key metrics

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Example metric | TBD |

### Visualizations

Insert generated figures from `outputs/`.

## Interpretation

Summarize findings, limitations, and confidence.

## Reproducibility

```bash
uv run ts-agents <command> ...
```

## Next steps

List follow-up experiments and production-readiness checks.
